name: FeatureCardTwentySix
description: Full-bleed media carousel feature cards with bottom text overlay and arrow navigation.
details: Use for showcasing features or courses with strong visual media. Each card has full-bleed image/video with a frosted glass gradient overlay at the bottom containing title, description, and an icon button. Uses ArrowCarousel layout with centered alignment, looping, prev/next arrow controls, and mask-fade-x edges. Active item is full opacity and scale, inactive items are reduced.

description.example: Handpicked by our team to help you start strong

structure.title: string - Card title displayed over media (required)
structure.description: string - Card description displayed over media (required)
structure.imageSrc: string - Path to background image (optional if videoSrc provided)
structure.videoSrc: string - Path to background video (optional if imageSrc provided)
structure.imageAlt: string - Alt text for background image
structure.videoAriaLabel: string - Aria label for background video
structure.buttonIcon: LucideIcon - Icon inside the card action button (required)

propsSchema.features: Array<{ title: string, description: string, imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string, videoAriaLabel?: string, buttonIcon: LucideIcon, buttonHref?: string, buttonOnClick?: () => void }>
propsSchema.title: string (required)
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>

usageExample: <FeatureCardTwentySix features={[{ title: 'UX Design Fundamentals', description: 'Learn user-centered design from scratch', imageSrc: '/course1.jpg', imageAlt: 'UX Design course', buttonIcon: ArrowRight, buttonHref: '#courses' }]} title="Featured Courses" description="Handpicked by our team" textboxLayout="default" useInvertedBackground={false} />
do: Use for showcasing features or courses with strong visual media
Use high-quality images or videos for full-bleed display
Each card requires a buttonIcon for the action button
dont: Do not use without media for each feature
Do not use for text-heavy content
